description: The Barbaro 'ndrina is a powerful clan of the 'Ndrangheta based in Platì, Calabria, Italy, founded in the late 19th century by Francesco Barbaro. It is one of the most powerful 'Ndrangheta clans, involved in drug trafficking, money laundering, arms trafficking, racketeering, corruption, extortion, and kidnapping. The clan operates in northern Italy (Lombardy, Piedmont) and Australia (New South Wales). It has been divided into multiple branches and was involved in a feud with the Mammoliti clan.

country_links.evidence_quote: The clan also operates in ... overseas in Australia, in particular in the Griffith, New South Wales area.
country_links.context: The Barbaro 'ndrina operates in Australia, particularly in Griffith, New South Wales, with members involved in cannabis cultivation and drug trafficking.

country_links.evidence_quote: On 23 January 2018, an operation by the Guardia di Finanza ... blocked drug trafficking between Colombia and the Lombard towns ... headed by the Barbaro 'ndrina
country_links.context: The Barbaro 'ndrina sources cocaine from Colombia for trafficking to Italy.

country_links.evidence_quote: The group organized and carried out international cocaine trafficking from South America to Italy, particularly Lombardy, using container ships
country_links.context: The Barbaro 'ndrina routes cocaine from South America to Italy via container ships.
